Title: Synthetic healthy baseline
Purpose: Verify baseline, output, and cleanup contracts without asserting exact runtime counters.

Arrange.Action: Create the bounded synthetic baseline database from a fixed seed.
Arrange.CompletionSignal: The synthetic database is online and registered to the lab run.

Act.Action: Run the bounded synthetic baseline workload.
Act.CompletionSignal: The workload completes without an injected fault.

Observe.Scope: Only the registered synthetic database and bounded server-level evidence.

AlternativeEvidence: An empty bounded result is valid when the procedure reports an explicit no-data status.
ExpectedFindings.AssertionBoundary: Exact waits, durations, plans, and row counts are not asserted.

AlternativeEvidence: A documented no-data status is acceptable for transient current-state groups.

Cleanup.Action: Remove only objects registered to the current lab run.
Cleanup.CompletionSignal: No registered database, volume, process, or network resource remains.

KnownLimitations: This planned scenario is not executable before the Welle 1 and Welle 2 runtime slices.
